this problem has no borders
🐾
Mexico City — Today
Vaccination card had all vaccine stickers. Missing vet signature. Grooming appointment denied.
A signature.
✈️
European Union
Health certificate valid for only 10 days. Microchip must be implanted before — not after — the rabies vaccination. Reversing that order voids the vaccine entirely under EU law.
10 days.
🌏
Australia
Mexico is a non-approved country. Pets cannot travel directly. Owner must first move to an approved country for 6 months — then wait 180 days after a blood test — then 10–30 days of quarantine on arrival.
Over a year.
The data exists.
It just isn't verifiable.
By anyone. Anywhere.
